summary: Comprehensive testing of SentinelX Defender cybersecurity dashboard completed successfully. All core functionalities working correctly including dashboard, scanner, admin authentication, and protected routes.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Python requests returning 404 HTML responses while curl works perfectly
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Direct curl verification confirmed all APIs working correctly

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with stats cards and system status
Scanner feature vector analysis form submission and results display
Admin login with demo credentials (admin@sentinelx.io / sentinel2024)
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Benchmark page loads with charts and metrics after admin login
Dataset page loads with sample table and filtering after admin login
Model page loads with architecture diagram after admin login
Scanner analysis produces detailed results with threat levels
YARA rules and LLM analysis sections display correctly
Responsive design works on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
Navigation between public and protected routes works correctly
Technical minimalist theme (Forest #1A3C2B / Paper #F7F7F5) properly applied
All form inputs and toggles in scanner work correctly
